title: Hong Kong、HK — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Hong Kong、HK的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Hong Kong是HK的一個城市，人口約7,498,000。A dynamic global financial center where East meets West, known for its iconic skyline, bustling harbor, and world-class shopping and dining.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
